title: Cannot run compose projects with HyperV machines
body:
### Issue Description

Tried to run a compose project against an HyperV machine

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create an HyperV podman machine
2. run podman compose up



### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

### Describe the results you expected

```
>>>> Executing external compose provider "C:\\Users\\Jeff\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\docker-compose.exe". Please refer to the documentation for details. <<<<

Failed to initialize: parse "unix://C:\\Users\\Jeff\\.local\\share\\containers\\podman\\machine\\hyperv\\podman.sock": invalid port ":\\Users\\Jeff\\.local\\share\\containers\\podman\\machine\\hyperv\\podman.sock" after host
Error: executing C:\Users\Jeff\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps\docker-compose.exe up: exit status 1
```

### Additional information

comments.body: can you provide a simple compose yaml to test with ?
My test done on the flask from awesome-compose: https://github.com/docker/awesome-compose/tree/master/flask
